subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Thy letter was received and its contents noted. The confusion in thy affairs is solely due to trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه مسطور منظور گردید پریشانی امور شما محض آنست که در محن و بلایا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
